title: chore(deps): update dependency @modelcontextprotocol/sdk to v1.25.2 [security]
summary: Renovate bot PR to update @modelcontextprotocol/sdk from 1.20.1 to 1.25.2 to address CVE-2026-0621 (ReDoS vulnerability). Only changes pnpm-lock.yaml (1 file). The lockfile also picks up transitive bumps for eslint (9.39.2→9.39.4) and hono (4.11.9→4.12.5). Approved only by github-actions bot, not by a human reviewer.
maintainerNotes: This PR has merge conflicts and CI failures (build, changeset, and multiple test suites). There are also duplicate open PRs: #11684 (dependabot, same target version 1.25.2) and #12684 (dependabot, newer version 1.26.0). Consider closing this in favor of #12684 which targets the newer 1.26.0 version and would also include the security fix. If proceeding with this PR, it needs a rebase to resolve conflicts, a changeset, and CI fixes. The security fix is important (ReDoS) so one of these PRs should be merged soon.
